_doc: Configuration for checks/check.mjs. denylist: retired facts that may never return in any scanned text file — add the OLD wording whenever a fact changes (see AGENTS.md conflict rule). Each entry: pattern (JS regex source, case-insensitive), why (shown on failure), optional exclude (path substrings to skip). docs/decisions/, archives and checks/ are never scanned — decision records may quote retired wording. extraTextExtensions/extraCodeExtensions: the stack skill adds this ecosystem's file types here. skipSymlinkCheck: set true only on Windows without symlink support.
